questions.question: What is Phentrieve?
questions.answer:
Phentrieve is an advanced AI-powered research tool that maps phenotype descriptions to standardized Human Phenotype Ontology (HPO) terms. It supports phenotype annotation for research, education, benchmarking, and knowledge discovery.

Key features include:

  • Mapping research text to HPO terms
  • Semantic retrieval with state-of-the-art AI models
  • Support for multiple languages
  • User-friendly interface

questions.question: How does Phentrieve work?
questions.answer:
Phentrieve uses a sophisticated pipeline of AI models and algorithms to process clinical text:

  1. Text Analysis: The system analyzes the input text using specialized biomedical language models
  2. Term Matching: It identifies potential HPO terms using semantic search and context-aware matching
  3. Ranking: The matches are ranked by relevance
  4. Results: The most relevant HPO terms are presented to the user

This process ensures high-quality matches while maintaining efficiency.

questions.question: Who can use Phentrieve?
questions.answer:
Phentrieve is for research and informational purposes only. It is not a clinical diagnostic tool.

Designed for:

  • Researchers: Standardizing phenotype descriptions in studies
  • Bioinformaticians: Automated phenotype analysis in research datasets
  • Educators and students: Learning HPO annotation concepts
  • Curators: Literature review and research documentation

The public service must not be used for diagnosis, treatment, triage, or other clinical decision-making.

questions.question: What performance can I expect?
questions.answer:
Our benchmark results show:

  • BioLORD-2023-M: HR@1=0.3333, HR@3=0.6667, HR@5=0.7778
  • Jina-v2-base-de: HR@1=0.2222, HR@3=0.4444, HR@5=0.5556

Performance may vary based on the complexity and specificity of the input text.
